# Other Industries

## **Pollution**

[]{#_Toc162809130 .anchor}At present this is done via forcing. Details on how to do this is under forcing in Volume 1 of the manual.

## **Other industries**

[]{#_Toc162809132 .anchor}Code exists for other coastal industries and will be added to the publicly available Atlantis in future. Please contact the development group for more details.
